title: What candidates ask us most.
description: If your question isn't here, the recruiter you're matched with on Talent500 can answer it after you apply.

items.q: Where are India GCC roles based?
items.a: All India GCC roles are based at our campus in Capitaland, Madhapur, Hyderabad. We're a single-office GCC.
All openings are facilitated by Talent500. Browse roles in the Careers section above or jump straight to talent500.com/jobs/costco. Submitting there starts the official process.

items.q: Are roles hybrid, remote, or onsite?
items.a: We work in a hybrid model anchored at the Hyderabad campus. The exact in-office cadence varies by role and team — your recruiter shares specifics after you apply.

items.q: What does the interview loop usually look like?
items.a: A typical loop is: recruiter chat → technical screen → 2–4 deep technical or domain rounds → hiring-manager conversation → values-alignment round. Specifics depend on level and team.

items.q: How long does the hiring process take?
items.a: Most loops complete in 3–5 weeks from first recruiter contact to offer. Senior or specialised roles can take longer because more partners are involved.

items.q: Do you sponsor work visas to other countries?
items.a: India GCC roles are based in Hyderabad and don't require a visa for Indian residents. We don't sponsor work visas to other countries from these roles.
Yes, for many roles where it's needed. Specifics depend on level and circumstance — confirm with your recruiter once you have an offer in motion.

items.q: Do you hire freshers and interns?
items.a: Yes. We hire from campuses and welcome interns across engineering, data, and design. Watch the Talent500 portal for early-career and internship openings.

Like most large employers we expect employees to be working only for Costco during their tenure (no dual employment). Personal projects and open-source contributions are typically fine — disclose anything that may create a conflict of interest.

items.q: What happens after I submit my application?
items.a: Talent500 routes your application to our talent-acquisition team. If there's a fit, a recruiter reaches out to schedule the first conversation. If not, you'll receive a notification. Either way, you don't need to follow up separately.
If you know someone at Costco India GCC, ask them to refer you through the internal program — it surfaces your application faster.

items.q: Will my application be subject to a background check?
items.a: All offers are subject to standard background verification (employment, education, identity, address, criminal record). It's a routine part of joining and the talent-acquisition team walks you through the steps.
